title: GW2 Location Data
description: Area location data nested by zone then area name. Structure: zone → area → {wikiUrl, waypoint?}

additionalProperties.description: Areas within this zone, keyed by area name

wikiUrl.description: GW2 Wiki URL for this area

waypoints.description: Waypoints in this area, ordered by proximity to the area's center

name.description: Waypoint name as it appears in game

chatLink.description: In-game chat link for the waypoint (e.g. [&BHoCAAA=])
